title: CVE-2009-1537: Microsoft DirectX RCE
summary: [P1] Microsoft DirectX contains a NULL byte overwrite vulnerability in the QuickTime Movie Parser Filter, which can be exploited for remote code execution. This vulnerability is being actively exploited in the wild and does not have a available patch. Why now: Reported exploitation in the wild without available patch. (confidence: 0.90)
classification_reasoning: DirectX vulnerability allows for remote code execution, affecting the framework layer.
